display.purpose: Hero headlines only — Doto at 48px. Never for UI labels.

headline.purpose: Page titles — Space Grotesk 24px in text-display color.

label.purpose: Mono uppercase chrome — buttons, step counters, metadata.

motion.name: duration-fast
motion.purpose: Button press, fill shifts, tactile scale.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Filled CTA — CONTINUE, NEXT, ENTER. White fill, black mono label, 6pt radius.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; min-width: 120px; height: 48px; padding: 0 24px; background: #FFFFFF; color: #000000; border: none; border-radius: 6px; font-family: 'Space Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; cursor: pointer; transition: background 160ms cubic-bezier(0.23, 1, 0.32, 1), transform 160ms cubic-bezier(0.23, 1, 0.32, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #E8E8E8; } .ds-btn-primary:active { background: #E8E8E8; transform: scale(0.97); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #FFFFFF; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { background: rgba(102, 102, 102, 0.35); color: #666666; cursor: not-allowed; transform: none; }

components.name: Outlined Button
components.description: Secondary navigation — BACK. 1px border, transparent fill.
components.css: .ds-btn-outlined { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; min-width: 120px; height: 48px; padding: 0 24px; background: transparent; color: #E8E8E8; border: 1px solid #333333; border-radius: 6px; font-family: 'Space Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 400; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; cursor: pointer; transition: background 160ms cubic-bezier(0.23, 1, 0.32, 1), border-color 160ms cubic-bezier(0.23, 1, 0.32, 1), color 160ms cubic-bezier(0.23, 1, 0.32, 1), transform 160ms cubic-bezier(0.23, 1, 0.32, 1); } .ds-btn-outlined:hover { background: rgba(232, 232, 232, 0.08); border-color: #E8E8E8; color: #FFFFFF; } .ds-btn-outlined:active { background: rgba(232, 232, 232, 0.08); border-width: 1.25px; border-color: #E8E8E8; color: #FFFFFF; transform: scale(0.97); } .ds-btn-outlined:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #E8E8E8; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Text Button
components.description: Tertiary action — SKIP. Mono uppercase, no border.
components.css: .ds-btn-text { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; padding: 10px 12px; background: transparent; color: #999999; border: none; border-radius: 6px; font-family: 'Space Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; cursor: pointer; transition: background 160ms cubic-bezier(0.23, 1, 0.32, 1), color 160ms cubic-bezier(0.23, 1, 0.32, 1), transform 160ms cubic-bezier(0.23, 1, 0.32, 1); } .ds-btn-text:hover { background: rgba(232, 232, 232, 0.06); color: #FFFFFF; } .ds-btn-text:active { background: rgba(232, 232, 232, 0.06); color: #FFFFFF; transform: scale(0.97); } .ds-btn-text:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #999999; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Progress Indicator
components.description: Onboarding step progress — active segment in signal red, inactive in border-visible.
components.css: .ds-progress { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; } .ds-progress-seg { display: block; width: 8px; height: 8px; border-radius: 6px; background: #333333; transition: width 200ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 0.1, 0.25, 1), background 200ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 0.1, 0.25, 1); } .ds-progress-seg--active { width: 24px; background: #D71921; } .ds-progress-seg--done { background: #333333; }

components.name: Onboarding Nav Row
components.description: BACK + NEXT paired row with 12px gap — standard feature-page footer.
components.html: <nav class="ds-nav-row" aria-label="Onboarding navigation"><button class="ds-btn-outlined ds-nav-row__back">BACK</button><button class="ds-btn-primary ds-nav-row__next">NEXT</button></nav>
components.css: .ds-nav-row { display: flex; gap: 12px; width: 100%; } .ds-nav-row__back, .ds-nav-row__next { flex: 1; min-width: 0; } .ds-btn-outlined { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; min-width: 120px; height: 48px; padding: 0 24px; background: transparent; color: #E8E8E8; border: 1px solid #333333; border-radius: 6px; font-family: 'Space Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 11px; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; cursor: pointer; transition: background 160ms cubic-bezier(0.23, 1, 0.32, 1), transform 160ms cubic-bezier(0.23, 1, 0.32, 1); } .ds-btn-outlined:active { transform: scale(0.97); } .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; min-width: 120px; height: 48px; padding: 0 24px; background: #FFFFFF; color: #000000; border: none; border-radius: 6px; font-family: 'Space Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; cursor: pointer; transition: background 160ms cubic-bezier(0.23, 1, 0.32, 1), transform 160ms cubic-bezier(0.23, 1, 0.32, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:active { background: #E8E8E8; transform: scale(0.97); }

components.name: Step Label
components.description: Feature page step counter — mono uppercase at top-right.
components.css: .ds-step-label { font-family: 'Space Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 400; letter-spacing: 0.08em; color: #999999; text-transform: uppercase; }

narrative.overview:
OpenCore's visual system is a developer workbench rendered in near-black monochrome: OLED canvas, stepped neutral surfaces, and typography that carries hierarchy before color ever does. The aesthetic draws from Nothing-inspired industrial craft—structure as ornament, subtractive composition, monospace labels at the edges—while staying inside Flutter's adaptive Material 3 shell on Android and iOS.

Dark mode is the primary expression (onboarding ships dark-first). Light mode mirrors the same tonal ladder with inverted ink. Interactive controls are tactile and precise: 6pt rounded rectangles, 48px touch height, scale-to-0.97 press feedback, and 160ms state transitions. Red (#D71921) is an event, not wallpaper—it marks active progress and errors only.
keyCharacteristics: Monochrome canvas with three-layer typographic hierarchy (display → grotesk body → mono labels)
Flat surfaces; depth conveyed by tonal steps, never drop shadows
6pt control radius on buttons, progress segments, and interactive shells
Signal red reserved for active state and error feedback
Tactile press feedback (scale + fill shift) on every primary control
Developer-native density: 24px screen gutters, tight 8–12px intra-group spacing

rules.name: The One Signal Rule
rules.body: Signal red appears only on active progress segments and error feedback. Its rarity is the point.

rules.name: The Monochrome-First Rule
rules.body: Any screen should remain legible in grayscale. Color encodes state, not hierarchy.

rules.name: The Three-Layer Rule
rules.body: Every screen has exactly three layers of importance: display primary, grotesk secondary, mono tertiary.

rules.name: The Mono Chrome Rule
rules.body: Button labels and step metadata use Space Mono uppercase. Prose never uses mono.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Shadows are prohibited on resting surfaces. Step surface tone or add a 1px border—pick one.

rules.name: The No Ghost Card Rule
rules.body: Never pair 1px border with soft wide box-shadow blur ≥16px on the same element.

dos: Do keep the scaffold at true black (#000000) in dark mode for OLED depth.
Do use 6px radius on every interactive control.
Do apply scale(0.97) + 160ms ease-out press feedback on all tappable chrome.
Do reserve Space Mono uppercase for system labels, step counters, and button copy.
Do honor prefers-reduced-motion by collapsing animations to instant state changes.
donts: Don't ship generic chat-bubble UIs or ChatGPT-clone layouts.
Don't use SaaS landing-page aesthetics: cream cards, gradient heroes, eyebrow kickers, or ghost-card shadows.
Don't use over-rounded, bubbly consumer chrome—no 24px+ card radii.
Don't use signal red as a decorative accent on buttons, heroes, or backgrounds.
Don't pair 1px borders with wide soft shadows on the same component.
Don't flatten hierarchy by giving every element the same size and weight.
